title: VELCRO Brand | HANGables Removable Picture Hanging Strips | 1 Pack of 4 Sets | Damage Free Picture Hanging for Pictures, Mirrors, Wall Décor | White | 4 Strips Holds up to 6kg/1 Picture
features: STRONG ADHESIVE HOLD, MULTIPURPOSE - Removable adhesvive strips with a strong adhesive backing so items stay firmly in place until ready to take down. Perfect for larger heavier pictures, posters, mirrors and wall décor up to 6kg

EASY PEEL TAB, DAMAGE-FREE HANGING - Simple on/off application with an easy to remove peel tab. When it's time to remove, they cleanly peel off without damaging the walls or leaving unsightly residue behind.

WORRY FREE MULTI-ROOM DECORATING - Securely fastens to most non-porous surfaces - smooth tile, finished wood, glass, painted drywall, or metal (not intended for porous or newly painted surfaces) Wait 24 hours before adjusting or removing object.

HANG SMALL FRAMES OR WALL COLLAGES - These low profile fasteners are ideal for hanging large photos, posters, clocks, or wall collages. Simply place one set in each corner. The possibilities are endless. Holds up to 6kg.

NO HAMMER OR NAILS REQUIRED - Removable wall fasteners are the simple way to decorate or organise on many surfaces without putting holes in the wall. Decorate without wall damage. Set includes 4 corner strips.
